User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user progress, best times, and profile information.

displayName.description: The user's display name from Google Auth.

bestTimes.description: A map of level IDs to best completion times in seconds.

totalEscapes.description: Total number of successful escapes across all modes.

createdAt.description: When the user first logged in.

updatedAt.description: When the user's progress was last updated.
